handoff.summary: Visual review completed: the flow is clear at native size, but the reduced-width legibility finding remains actionable.

artifacts.name: visual-clarity-review.json
artifacts.content: {"verdict":"fix","checks":{"sources":{"generator":{"status":"pass","sha256":"3418ad3060593601371a5ec5d7389da2a170952e9cced3c9557fdb1f47b85a37","bytes":12933},"readme":{"status":"pass","sha256":"5f1de5c6204e98559a4c118dd3d19d5fec1bc8d9179590e60293a571605b4867","bytes":2900},"gif":{"status":"pass","sha256":"519585ef77a34f0b7faa5b122f4b8ebc759525f0de6f25e2243ffb387735cc20","bytes":1024955}},"initial":"pass: goal and modular workflow rail are comprehensible on first read.","parallel":"pass: the three specialist lanes and conditional external-host parallelism are explicit.","final":"pass: the return path visibly fans into VERIFY, then continues through MERGE and MEMORY.","owner":"pass: the owner label plus adjacent README prose clearly assign verification, integration, trace preservation, and memory updates.","trace":"pass: the continuous full-execution trace is visually distinct and named.","overlap":"pass: no harmful text or route overlap; interlocking module connectors read as intentional rail connections.","halfWidth":"fix: at 600px rendered width, the 14-17px internal labels scale to about 7-8.5px and module labels to about 11px, making the host-parallel label and AGENT captions unreliable to read."},"priorReducedWidthFinding":{"resolved":false,"reason":"The revised layout removes collision concerns but does not raise the scaled text size enough for dependable half-width reading."},"findings":[{"id":"half-width-legibility","severity":"release","action":"Provide a 600px-specific composition or increase and simplify the internal labels so every required concept remains legible at half-width; re-review opening, parallel, and final frames at 600x280."}]}

assumptions: Half-width legibility means rendering the 1200x560 GIF at 600x280 CSS pixels.
risks: The visual is release-ready at native size, but reduced-width viewers may miss the parallelism condition and agent identity labels.
followUps: Re-review the exact opening, parallel, and final states after a reduced-width typography or composition adjustment.

handoff.summary: Revision 2 is not release-ready: the README states the V11 boundary accurately, but the checker does not preserve conditional host and visual ownership or cover every normative host-owned exclusion family.

scripts/check-template.ps1:1591-1604 requires those anchors and :1642 rejects core decomposition; scripts/test-check-template.ps1:616-617 and :733-749 cover both directions."},{"id":"conditional-host-scheduling-dispatch-visual","status":"fix","evidence":"README.md:9 and :15 correctly assign approved, dependency-safe parallel execution to an external host and make it conditional. scripts/check-template.ps1:1576-1588 checks only visual path and count, while :1595 requires host dispatch without preserving conditionality; the visual tests at scripts/test-check-template.ps1:545-570 do not test ownership or conditional execution."},{"id":"positive-core-host-anchors","status":"pass","evidence":"README.md:18-19 positively assigns package, raw-handoff, and dependency-fan-in verification to core and provider/model selection, dispatch, merge, trace persistence, and memory updates to the external host. scripts/check-template.ps1:1594-1595 requires both anchors; scripts/test-check-template.ps1:760-770 and :1188-1202 remove and test each requested component."},{"id":"negative-host-capability-families","status":"fix","evidence":"scripts/check-template.ps1:1638-1648 and scripts/test-check-template.ps1:594-625 cover execution and dispatch, provider and model selection, tools, permissions, trace and event persistence, integration and merge, memory, and decomposition. They omit exclusions required by the normative contract at :455-460 for prompt, profile, executor, and credential choice; runtime capacity and launch-wave guarantees; sandbox, worktree, filesystem-boundary, workspace-isolation, and process-limit enforcement; state, prompt, result, and handoff persistence; retry, cancel, resume, and recovery; and merge-readiness decisions."}],"priorFindingDisposition":[{"finding":"human/IDE semantic decomposition ownership","disposition":"resolved","basis":"README, checker, and focused positive and negative fixtures agree with the normative ownership boundary."},{"finding":"conditional host scheduling/dispatch and visual ownership","disposition":"partially-resolved","basis":"The README is accurate, but checker and fixture protection is incomplete."},{"finding":"complete positive core-versus-host anchors","disposition":"resolved","basis":"All requested positive anchors are present and individually regression-tested."},{"finding":"focused negative regression coverage for every host-owned capability family","disposition":"unresolved","basis":"Several explicit V11 exclusion families have neither checker patterns nor failing fixtures."}],"actionableFindings":[{"id":"R2-1","severity":"release","location":"scripts/check-template.ps1:1576","finding":"Conditional external-host scheduling and visual ownership can be removed or reassigned while the checker still passes.","requiredFix":"Require active ownership-bearing visual alt text and the approved, dependency-safe, conditional host execution statement; add removal and reassignment fixtures."},{"id":"R2-2","severity":"release","location":"scripts/check-template.ps1:1638","finding":"Negative rules and fixtures do not cover every host-owned family explicitly excluded by V11.","requiredFix":"Add focused checker alternatives and one failing fixture per omitted exclusion family, including runtime supply, capacity, isolation, persistence, recovery, and merge-readiness claims."}]}

assumptions: Visual ownership was assessed from the bound README alt text and checker rules because the GIF payload is outside the declared read scope.
risks: The write-producing regression harness was not executed; test conclusions are based on static review as required.
followUps: Strengthen the checker and fixtures for conditional external-host scheduling and visual ownership.
Add negative regression coverage for every omitted V11 host-owned exclusion family.

note: Each raw handoff was verified by core. This external gate does not claim a SpecialistHandoffSetAssessment because the integration owner is not a dependent AgentBlueprint.
